vocab.example: If granted the opportunity, I would love to delve into cutting-edge technology, specifically in the field of quantum computing.
I am keen on an interdisciplinary approach that combines environmental science with urban planning.

vocab.meaning: sự ham học hỏi/tò mò về trí tuệ
vocab.example: My intellectual curiosity often leads me to explore complex theories in behavioral economics.
I am interested in researching modern pedagogical methods to improve literacy rates in rural areas.

vocab.meaning: mở đường cho/tạo tiền đề cho
vocab.example: Studying renewable energy could pave the way for a more sustainable future in my home country.

vocab.meaning: chuyên gia am tường về một lĩnh vực cụ thể
vocab.example: My ultimate goal is to become a subject matter expert in international maritime law.
I want to master the theoretical framework behind artificial intelligence to better understand its ethical implications.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng các kỹ năng của bản thân
vocab.example: Taking a course in data analytics would significantly broaden my skill set and enhance my employability.

vocab.meaning: theo đuổi các nghiên cứu/học tập chuyên sâu
vocab.example: I hope to pursue advanced studies in clinical psychology at a prestigious institution abroad.
Studying philosophy would provide me with a holistic understanding of human nature and ethics.
